V.SHIP-INT-DOC-017 Rev.0 · Issued 17-AUG-2025 · Prepared: Girish Adtani · Checked: Robert Martin · Approved: Sanford D'Souza

🎯 RBI Scope & Boundaries

Static pressurized equipment and piping for both topside and marine side with identification tags in P&IDs. For marine piping without tags, 23 simplified groups were created.

Excluded Items:

  • Boilers, turbines, and generators
  • Rotating and machinery equipment (pumps, compressors)
  • Instrumentation and electrical
  • Cranes and structures
  • Vessel internals
  • Cargo / slops / ballast tanks
  • Seals, gaskets, small tubing, PSVs

📅 Key Assessment Parameters

ParameterValue
First Oil / Start Date07-Apr-2003
RBI Assessment Date31-Oct-2024
Plan Horizon Date31-Oct-2027
Design Life10 years
Equip. Design CodeASME VIII Div 1
Piping Design CodeASME B31.3
RBI SoftwareSynergi RBI Offshore
MethodologyDNV RP-G101
Ambient Temperature28°C (82.4°F)
Atmospheric Pressure1 bara ≈ 0.01 barg
UT Standard Deviation0.5 mm
RT Standard Deviation0.2% of reading

⚗️ Damage Mechanisms (DNV RP-G101)

  • CO₂ Corrosion: Uniform model; adjustment factor 0.05 for dehydrated gas to reduce calculated rate
  • External Corrosion: Insulation confirmed by site visit Apr-2016; rate adjusted per coating/insulation condition (good/average/poor)
  • Sand Erosion: Flow rate set to HIGH ~1,000 kg/day; failure rate + adjusted CR used in calculation
  • Wet H₂S (SSC/HIC/SOHIC): Applied only if H₂S partial pressure > 0.3 kPa per NACE MR0175/ISO15156
  • Injection/Mix Point: CR = 3× internal corrosion rate (API 570 Sect.5.3.1). Active injection points only.
  • Chloride Pitting: Fresh water / steam condensate assumed Cl⁻ < 100 ppm
  • GVI Note: External visual inspection alone does not significantly benefit RBI unless thickness readings are taken

📊 Consequence of Failure (CoF) Basis

Scale: A (lowest) → E (highest). Assessed for Economic, Safety, Environmental.

Gas Inj. 3rd→GI: Safety E Steam Condenser: Safety E HP Flare KO→Tip: Econ E Process Gas: Safety D Well Fluid Riser→Choke: Safety D Dehydrated Gas: Safety D HP Flare→KO Drum: Safety D Cargo Oil Offloading: Safety C Process Liquid: Safety C Gas Compression: Safety C/D Seawater Cooling: Safety B Fire Water: Safety A Open Drain: Safety A Fresh Water: Safety A

🎨 Coating & Lining Types

TypeFull Prot. Start (yr)No Prot. (yr)
Coating 0-5 / Liner 0-505
Coating 0-10010
Coating 5-10 / Liner 5-10 / HDG Steel510
Glass Flake Lining / Epoxy Lining515

Wire-mesh for personnel protection is not considered insulation in RBI. Insulation existence confirmed by site visit Apr-2016.

Inspection History Incorporated: BWO Roving Team (2010–2013), Dacon Inspection Services (2013), Corrosion Survey 4266-RA-00389526, Skysite Annual Inspections (2014–2023)
